name: CA Debugger
description: Standalone Clarion debugger: the ClarionDbg TSWD debug engine (CLI + Core) and the CA Debugger IDE addin (src/ClarionDebugger.Addin). Installs in the Clarion IDE independently of Clarion Assistant — native gutter breakpoints, stepping, call stack with proc names, watch-by-name. Extracted from ClarionAssistant (task 74c792f8).
changeLog:
## v1.0.1 - 2026-06-10
- Settings popup + configurable debug shortcut keys [Task #03f76cd0]
